document.name: Portkey AI Gateway Integration
document.description: Comprehensive guide for integrating Portkey as the AI service abstraction layer. Covers unified API usage, provider auto-selection, cost tracking, and streaming responses.

document.name: Prompt Engineering Guide
document.description: Best practices for creating effective prompts and system messages. Includes templates for content generation, data extraction, and cost optimization strategies.

document.name: Performance Optimization
document.description: Detailed performance optimization strategies across build-time, server-side, client-side, network, and database layers with MakerKit-specific optimizations.

document.name: Service Architecture Patterns
document.description: Functional service architecture patterns used in the application. Covers feature services, server actions, integration services, and API functions.

document.name: State Management
document.description: State management patterns and best practices for managing application state across client and server components.

document.name: System Design Overview
document.description: Overall system architecture and design principles for the SlideHeroes platform.

document.name: Payload CMS Patterns
document.description: Payload CMS configuration patterns for collections, field types, hooks, access control, and versioning with implementation examples.

document.name: Content Migration System Guide
document.description: Comprehensive guide for the content migration system including setup, usage, and best practices.

document.name: Content Migration Overview
document.description: Overview of content migration processes and procedures for Payload CMS.

document.name: Content Migration Troubleshooting
document.description: Troubleshooting guide for common content migration issues and their solutions.

document.name: Database Verification & Repair
document.description: Database integrity checking and repair procedures for Payload CMS data.

document.name: Detailed Database Repair Guide
document.description: In-depth guide for database verification and repair with step-by-step procedures.

document.name: Loading Phase Guide
document.description: Guide for managing Payload CMS loading phases and initialization sequences.

document.name: Quiz Relationship Troubleshooting
document.description: Specific troubleshooting guide for quiz relationship issues in the CMS.

document.name: WSL Troubleshooting
document.description: WSL-specific issues and solutions for Payload CMS development environment.

document.name: Debug Issue Command Example
document.description: Example usage of the debug-issue command for systematic debugging.

document.name: Execute Parallel Command Example
document.description: Example of executing tasks in parallel for improved performance.

document.name: Initialize Parallel Command Example
document.description: Example of initializing parallel processes and workflows.

document.name: Prime Command Example
document.description: Example of the prime command for preparing the development environment.

document.name: Database Schema Documentation
document.description: Complete database schema documentation for auth, public, and payload schemas including table structures, relationships, indexes, and TypeScript types.

document.name: React Query Patterns
document.description: React Query implementation patterns and best practices including provider configuration, query functions, and SSR/hydration strategies.

document.name: Supabase Patterns
document.description: Supabase-specific patterns and best practices for database operations and real-time features.

document.name: Debugging System Overview
document.description: Two-command debugging system using /log-issue and /debug-issue for systematic issue documentation and resolution.

document.name: Common Debugging Patterns
document.description: Common debugging patterns and strategies for typical issues encountered in the application.

document.name: Database Debugging
document.description: Specific debugging techniques for database-related issues including query analysis and performance troubleshooting.

document.name: Error Handling Guide
document.description: Comprehensive error handling strategies and patterns for robust application behavior.

document.name: GitHub First Issues Guide
document.description: Guide for creating and managing GitHub issues effectively for bug tracking and feature requests.

document.name: Integration Debugging
document.description: Debugging guide for third-party integrations and API connectivity issues.

document.name: Performance Debugging
document.description: Performance debugging techniques for identifying and resolving performance bottlenecks.

document.name: Authentication Patterns
document.description: Comprehensive authentication patterns using Supabase Auth covering client/server-side auth, OAuth, MFA, session management, and security best practices.

document.name: Authorization Patterns
document.description: Authorization patterns and Row Level Security (RLS) implementation for fine-grained access control.

document.name: Unit Testing Prioritization Plan
document.description: Strategic plan for implementing unit tests with four-phase implementation strategy prioritizing custom business logic.

document.name: Test Case Template
document.description: Standard template for creating consistent and comprehensive test cases.

document.name: Unit Test Checklist
document.description: Comprehensive checklist for ensuring thorough unit test coverage.

document.name: Unit Test Tracking Guide
document.description: Guide for tracking unit test implementation progress and coverage metrics.

document.name: Testing Fundamentals
document.description: Core testing principles and patterns including AAA pattern, naming conventions, test structure, and essential patterns for the SlideHeroes codebase.

document.name: Mocking and TypeScript Testing Guide
document.description: Comprehensive guide for all mocking strategies and TypeScript-specific testing patterns. Includes Vitest mocking, project-specific mocks (Supabase, server actions, Portkey), and TypeScript compilation fixes.

document.name: Testing Examples
document.description: Concrete, working test examples from the SlideHeroes codebase organized by feature type. Includes server actions, React components, AI integrations, and real-world patterns.

document.name: TypeScript Test Patterns
document.description: Comprehensive TypeScript patterns for fixing test file compilation errors. Covers common error patterns, action result types, mock patterns, component testing, Supabase mocks, error handling, and best practices specific to the SlideHeroes codebase.

document.name: Component Patterns
document.description: Component structure patterns for client and server components with real-world examples and best practices.

document.name: Accessibility Guidelines
document.description: Accessibility guidelines and WCAG compliance requirements for UI components.

document.name: Responsive Design Patterns
document.description: Responsive design patterns and breakpoint strategies for multi-device support.

document.name: Tailwind CSS Standards
document.description: Tailwind CSS usage standards and conventions for consistent styling.

document.name: UI Components Guide
document.description: Comprehensive guide for working with shadcn UI and Aceternity UI component libraries. Covers usage patterns, installed components, adding new components, and best practices.

document.name: Git Aliases
document.description: Custom git aliases and shortcuts for improved development workflow.

document.name: Process Flows
document.description: Application process flows and workflow documentation.

document.name: Role-Based Implementation
document.description: Guide for implementing role-based features and access control.

document.name: UV Single-File Scripts
document.description: Guide for using UV single-file scripts for utility functions and automation.

category.name: Test Case Specifications
category.description: Specific test case documentation for individual components and services throughout the application, organized by file path.
category.note: Test case documents follow the pattern: test-cases/[app-path]/[component-name].test-cases.md
